title: Yoga Program
description: Comprehensive yoga program combining flexibility, balance, core strength, and mindfulness for holistic wellness.
overview: This yoga program progresses through various styles including Hatha, Vinyasa, and Yin yoga to improve flexibility, balance, strength, and mental clarity. Suitable for all levels from beginner to advanced. Expected benefits: increased flexibility, better sleep, reduced stress, and improved focus.

weekly_schedule.exercises: Sun salutations, standing poses (Warrior I/II, Triangle), balancing poses (Tree), breathing exercises (Pranayama)
Dynamic flowing sequences, downward dog, chaturanga, upward dog, planks, lunges, handstands
Long-held poses (3-5 minutes each), hip openers, pigeon pose, forward folds, restorative poses
Planks, boat pose, arm balances, hand stands, inversions, core work
Gentle stretches, restorative poses, meditation, breathing exercises
Challenging sequences, arm balances, deep backbends, inversions, strength poses

nutrition.content: Smoothie bowl with Greek yogurt, berries, granola, and coconut flakes
1 apple + 15g almonds or handful of nuts
Quinoa salad with chickpeas, vegetables, olive oil, and feta
Banana or light snack with water
Tofu stir-fry with vegetables, brown rice, and sesame oil

tips: Practice on an empty stomach - eat light 2-3 hours before
Use props (blocks, straps, bolsters) to support your practice
Never force stretches - breathe into the resistance
Hold each pose for at least 5 deep breaths to gain full benefit
Practice consistently - 3-4 sessions per week minimum
Listen to your body - modify poses as needed
Focus on proper alignment to prevent injuries
Keep your gaze (drishti) steady to improve balance
Practice at the same time each day for routine building
Join a class or find a teacher for personalized guidance
Meditate for 10-15 minutes daily to enhance mental benefits
Be patient - flexibility improvements take weeks to months
Avoid forcing deep backbends if you have back issues
Remember: yoga is not about being perfect, it's about progress
